# UI/UX Pro Max

Load and follow the complete skill instructions from [skills/ui-ux-pro-max/PROMPT.md](../../skills/ui-ux-pro-max/PROMPT.md).

All skill data (CSV databases, Python scripts) lives in `skills/ui-ux-pro-max/`.

When running search commands, use paths relative to the repository root:

```bash
python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py "<query>" --design-system -p "Project Name"
```
